scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, peer-to-peer recommendation hook tailored for Indian professionals.
- Replaces the Spanish immersion concept with a practical English learning challenge, setting clear milestones (overcoming hesitation, gaining confidence, workplace impression).
- Ends with a direct, encouraging Call to Action (CTA) to drive app engagement.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
मैंने अपने दोस्त को बोला,
MONDAY से SUPERNOVA ENGLISH CHALLENGE शुरू!
And you should join too.
DAY 6: Hesitation खत्म
DAY 13: Confidence के साथ English
DAY 19: Office में सब इम्प्रेस
ARE YOU IN?
